features: TEXTURISING FORMULA: At Slick Gorilla, we talk straight. The sea salt hair spray adds volume, texture, and grip for beach waves and a natural, matte finish. Believe the results.

SEA SALT INFUSION: This texturising spray enhances hair with the texture-boosting power of sea salt, absorbing excess oil for a casual, messy look. Authentic, straight-out-of-bed styling with a fresh citrus aroma.
LIGHTWEIGHT & REWORKABLE: No stiffness, no tacky or greasy residue. The lightweight salt hair spray for men offers flexible hold without weighing your hair down.

SPRAY & SCRUNCH: Short, long, straight, wavy, or curly, just spritz the hair texture spray onto damp or dry hair, then scrunch or tousle for effortless, just-off-the-beach waves. Easy to apply and wash out.
LOOK GOOD, FEEL GOOD: Take control with hair styling products that are vegan, cruelty-free, ethically sourced, and kind to the planet. Slick Gorilla. For hair that does what you tell it.

product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Hair Care › Styling Products › Salt Water Sprays
product_details_tab_data.Specific Uses: Hair Styling,Our Salt Spray works best on clean hair to help control frizz and flyaways. For loose, natural movement, spray onto damp hair, comb through, and leave to air dry. For added volume, spritz from root to tip, work it through thoroughly, and blow-dry while shaping your desired style. Finish with our Clay Pomade for extra definition
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: AQUA (WATER), ALOE BARBADENSIS (ALOE VERA) LEAF JUICE, MAGNESIUM SULFATE, ALCOHOL DENAT., SODIUM CHLORIDE, ERYTHRITOL, SACCHAROMYCES CEREVISIAE EXTRACT, VP/VA COPOLYMER, PANTHENOL, CHONDRUS CRISPUS (CARRAGEENAN) EXTRACT, HELIANTHUS ANNUUS (SUNFLOWER) SEED EXTRACT, GLYCERIN, LEUCONOSTOC/RADISH ROOT FERMENT FILTRATE, PARFUM (FRAGRANCE), POTASSIUM SULPHATE, CALCIUM SULPHATE, POTASSIUM SORBATE, SODIUM BENZOATE, CITRIC ACID, PHENOXYETHANOL, PEG-40 HYDROGENATED CASTOR OIL, ETHYLHEXYLGLYCERIN, LIMONENE, LINALOOL
product_details_tab_data.Special Ingredients: Himalayan Pink Salt, Magnesium Sulfate (Epsom Salts), Organic Aloe Vera, Pro-Vitamin B5, Seaweed (Carrageenan) Extract
